layout_checks.name: drive gear plane separated below fixed ring
display is integrated into cage body
no hardware reference imported as floating CAD

motion_problem_extraction.problem: V17 orbit_and_spin_z used spin_ratio as if it were absolute spin, but the transform added it to cage orbit.
motion_problem_extraction.resolution: V18 uses orbit_absolute_spin_z with absolute_spin_ratio explicitly defined.
V18 declares pose_parameter as cage_angle_deg and derives hand crank inverse motion from the gear pair.

motion_problem_extraction.problem: Gear relations were split across design_checks and part motion fields.
motion_problem_extraction.resolution: V18 adds a motion_contract relations list used by the motion command.

relations.name: fixed ring determines absolute orbit pinion spin
hand crank pinion inversely drives cage
